subcodes.first_line: O ye sons and daughters of the Kingdom! Your letter, which was surely inspired of heaven, hath been received.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابناء و بنات ملکوت نامه شما که بالهام آسمانی مرقوم وصول یافت مضامین دلنشین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
